hero.subtitle: Drop in a vendor quote. Get back exactly where you're overpaying, what to push for, and a ready-to-send email — in under 60 seconds.
hero.noSignup: No signup needed. Free to try.
hero.check1: Spot hidden fees, inflated rates, and unfavorable clauses
hero.check2: Get a negotiation playbook with asks that move the needle
hero.check3: Send a polished reply in your tone, ready to copy and go
builtFor.title: Not everyone has a procurement team. Now it doesn't matter.
builtFor.subtitle: Whether it's a SaaS renewal, agency retainer, office supplies, or any vendor contract — just drop in your quote and let TermLift do the heavy lifting.
builtFor.foundersDesc: Stop getting burned on your first agency or SaaS contract. TermLift tells you exactly what's overpriced, what to push for, and gives you the words to say it.
builtFor.opsDesc: Managing 5 supplier renewals at once with no procurement support? Get a full negotiation plan on every contract in under a minute.
builtFor.buyersDesc: You don't have a legal team or a procurement department. TermLift gives you the same leverage the big guys have — on every quote you receive.
howItWorks.title: From quote to savings in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no back-and-forth with legal. Just clarity on what to ask for and the words to say it.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload a PDF, paste an email, or snap a screenshot. Any format works.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get red flags, savings opportunities, and a full negotiation plan in seconds.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Copy a ready-made email with your asks baked in — pick your tone and go.
example.headline: This is what your vendor hoped you wouldn't notice.
example.youPaste: You paste in a vendor quote
example.withAllDetails: with all red flags, negotiation plan, and email drafts.
social.quote1: I was about to sign a €45K SaaS renewal. TermLift flagged two clauses I would have missed. Saved €8,400 in 10 minutes.
social.title1: Ops Lead, B2B SaaS startup — Paris
social.quote2: We use this for every agency pitch now. The email drafts alone are worth it — I just copy, edit the name, and send.
social.quote3: Didn't realize our supplier had baked in a 15% annual price escalation clause until TermLift caught it. Game changer.
privacy.title: Your quotes stay yours
privacy.subtitle: Confidential pricing deserves confidential handling. Your data is encrypted, never trained on, and deleted when you say so.
privacy.encryptionDesc: Data encrypted in transit and at rest. Securely processed and deleted after analysis unless you save it.
privacy.noTrainingDesc: Your pricing, terms, and vendor details are never fed back into any model.
privacy.gdprDesc: EU-hosted infrastructure with full compliance built in from day one.
privacy.learnMore: Learn more about our security practices
pricing.title: Start free. Scale when ready.
pricing.subtitle: Try your first analysis with no signup. Upgrade as your negotiation needs grow.
cta.title: That quote in your inbox? You're probably overpaying.
cta.subtitle: Find out in 60 seconds. No signup, no commitment — just clarity on what you should be paying.
hero.verdictDesc: You're overpaying on ad fees and the retainer is above market. Two asks could save you €16,800/year.
hero.redFlagTitle: 20% ad fee — double the industry standard
hero.redFlagDesc: €1,800/mo in ad fees vs €900 at 10%. That's €10,800/yr overpaid.
hero.emailSnippet: "The 20% ad fee is above the 10% we've seen elsewhere. At €9K/month spend, that's €10,800/year — could we align on 10%?"
example.redFlag1Title: 20% ad fee — double the industry standard
example.redFlag1Desc: You're paying €1,800/mo in ad fees. At 10%, it'd be €900. That's €10,800/yr overpaid.
example.redFlag2Desc: Comparable agencies charge €6,000-6,500. Push to €7,000 and save €6,000/yr.
example.emailSnippet: "The 20% ad fee is above the 10% we've seen elsewhere. At €9K/month spend, that's €10,800/year — could we align on 10%?"
example.quoteDeliverables: Deliverables: Up to 8 blog posts/month, social media, paid ads

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, subscription, and preferences.
settings.resetSent: Reset email sent — check your inbox
settings.saveTextDesc: When enabled, the text extracted from your uploaded files is stored with the deal for reference. When disabled, only the AI analysis is saved.
settings.productEmailsDesc: Occasional emails about new features, improvements, and Pro plan launch. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
settings.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

settings.deleteBullet3: All saved email drafts and negotiation plans
